5,000/mo, liquidity deposit 0,000-$50,000, licensing 5,000- 00,000 (jurisdiction-dependent), marketing $3,000- 0,000/mo, staff $5,000-$20,000/mo. Total first year ranges from $200,000-$500,000 — a fraction of the cost of building from scratch.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cimg src=\"/assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental.jpg\" alt=\"Cost calculation for broker launch\" style=\"width:100%;border-radius:8px;margin:1.5rem 0\" data-post-slug=\"cost-starting-forex-broker-rental\" data-image-kind=\"content\" srcset=\"/assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental-480.jpg 480w, /assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental-768.jpg 768w, /assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental.jpg 1280w\" sizes=\"(max-width: 767px) calc(100vw - 2rem), 800px\" width=\"1280\" height=\"720\" /\u003e\u003cp\u003eFor comparison: launching with custom platform development starts at ,000,000 and often exceeds $3,000,000 in the first year. Rental lets you enter the market with minimal capital and scale as your client base grows, paying more only when revenue supports it.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003eFrequently Overlooked Expenses\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eWhen budgeting, account for legal counsel ($2,000-$5,000/mo), accounting, security certificates, DDoS protection, and data backup services. Payment system integrations represent a separate cost — each provider charges connection fees and per-transaction commissions that compound with volume.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cimg src=\"/assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental.jpg\" alt=\"Brokerage business budgeting\" style=\"width:100%;border-radius:8px;margin:1.5rem 0\" data-post-slug=\"cost-starting-forex-broker-rental\" data-image-kind=\"content\" srcset=\"/assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental-480.jpg 480w, /assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental-768.jpg 768w, /assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental.jpg 1280w\" sizes=\"(max-width: 767px) calc(100vw - 2rem), 800px\" width=\"1280\" height=\"720\" /\u003e\u003cp\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://maketrades.info\"\u003eMakeTrades\u003c/a\u003e offers packages from ,000/mo with included infrastructure, significantly lowering the barrier to entry.\u003c/p\u003e","image_url":"/assets/blog/cost-starting-forex-broker-rental.jpg","language":"en","published":true,"hidden_from_users":true,"created_at":"2026-02-02T19:03:06.295649+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-08T19:03:06.295649+00:00","author":"MakeTrades Team","category":"Platform Rental","tags":["startup cost","broker budget","platform rental","investment","expenses"],"reading_time":7,"meta_title":"Cost of Starting a Forex Broker","meta_description":"Complete cost breakdown for launching a forex broker via platform rental. First-year budget guide.","legacy_slug":"cost-starting-forex-broker-rental","canonical_slug":"cost-starting-forex-broker-rental","alternates":[{"language":"en","slug":"cost-starting-forex-broker-rental","legacy_slug":"cost-starting-forex-broker-rental"}]};

Platform Rental • 2/2/2026 • 7 min read

Cost of Starting a Forex Broker via Platform Rental

Complete cost breakdown for launching a forex brokerage using a rented platform: licenses, infrastructure, and staffing.

MakeTrades Team
MakeTrades Expert

Initial Investment and Monthly Expenses

Launching via platform rental requires significantly less capital. Typical first-year budget: platform rental $5,000-$15,000/mo, liquidity deposit $10,000-$50,000, licensing $15,000-$100,000 (jurisdiction-dependent), marketing $3,000-$10,000/mo, staff $5,000-$20,000/mo. Total first year ranges from $200,000-$500,000 — a fraction of the cost of building from scratch.

For comparison: launching with custom platform development starts at $1,000,000 and often exceeds $3,000,000 in the first year. Rental lets you enter the market with minimal capital and scale as your client base grows, paying more only when revenue supports it.

Frequently Overlooked Expenses

When budgeting, account for legal counsel ($2,000-$5,000/mo), accounting, security certificates, DDoS protection, and data backup services. Payment system integrations represent a separate cost — each provider charges connection fees and per-transaction commissions that compound with volume.

MakeTrades offers packages from $1,000/mo with included infrastructure, significantly lowering the barrier to entry.

Tags: startup costbroker budgetplatform rentalinvestmentexpenses
